headline: Cost Pressures Are Reshaping Today’s Small and Mid-Sized Business Workforce
summary: NEW YORK, April 07, 2026--Small and mid-sized (SMB) businesses are navigating an increasingly complex environment marked by rising costs, heightened employee financial stress, and growing expectations. New insights from MetLife’s 2026 U.S. Employee Benefit Trends Study (EBTS) show that affordability pressures are reshaping how SMB employers operate and how their employees experience work.
